description: Infer a gene regulatory network from an expression matrix using GRNBoost2 (stochastic gradient boosting). Reads a TSV expression matrix (genes as columns, observations as rows), optionally restricts regulators to a transcription-factor list, and writes a TF–target–importance network TSV.
rules: read-only / local — never mutates remote or live state
EXPRESSION_FILE is a TSV with genes as columns and observations (cells/samples) as rows
TF_FILE is optional (one TF name per line); empty = all genes treated as potential regulators
SEED makes the run reproducible; LIMIT caps the network to the top-N links globally
output network.tsv has columns TF, target, importance (no header, tab-separated)
runs inference on the local machine via the vendored arboreto core
usage: Set EXPRESSION_FILE (TSV). Optionally set TF_FILE, SEED, LIMIT. Output: network.tsv (+ grnboost2.log).
limitation: Requires the arboreto Python package (with dask/distributed/scikit-learn) installed in the runtime to produce a real network; when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes an empty artifact. python3 in the test runtime is 3.9.
